response.justification: Candidate has strong software engineering fundamentals and 14+ years of experience, but the resume lacks the critical modern C++ expertise and industrial automation domain knowledge required for a senior C++ role. Recent experience is predominantly in web/TypeScript/Node.js, with the last substantial C++ work dating to 2014–2015. No evidence of MQTT, message brokers, IEC 62443 standards, or the embedded systems and control systems background essential for this position.
strengths: Demonstrates deep software craftsmanship with proven TDD, agile, and clean-code practices across multiple roles
14+ years of software development with architectural design experience and strong mentoring background
IoT/GIS platform development (GISCollective) shows some domain exposure in distributed, event-driven systems
concerns: C++ experience is outdated (last significant work 2014–2015, ~11 years ago) and insufficient for a senior-level C++ role requiring modern systems programming
No demonstrated expertise in required domain: industrial automation, embedded systems, MQTT, message brokers, or IEC 62443 security standards
Recent career focuses on web/modern tech (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than systems programming, concurrent design, or networked multi-threaded applications

key_factors.factor: Software engineering practices and mentoring capability
